text: BUG: DataFrame.groupby() raises KeyError when a MultiIndex column is missing.
Calling pd.read_csv(file, chunksize=1000) returns a TextFileReader that doesn't expose .shape.
df.merge(other, how='outer') fails with ValueError: keys not in left frame on pandas 2.1.0.
Documentation for pandas.api.types.is_numeric_dtype is missing the value_counts() example.
When df.loc[idx, col] is called, the result should be a Series but is sometimes a DataFrame.
ENH: add Series.between_time() support for timezone-aware datetime indices.
Why does numpy.ndarray.flatten() work but pandas.Series.flatten() raise AttributeError?
Tests in tests/series/test_constructors.py fail randomly with AssertionError on 2.2.x.
Setting pandas.options.mode.chained_assignment to 'warn' should not affect .loc[...] assignments.
pd.concat() with ignore_index=True produces unexpected MultiIndex in pandas 2.0.
Regression: DataFrame.to_csv(buf) no longer accepts buf as io.BytesIO under pandas 2.0.
Series.str.contains(pat, regex=True) raises re.error on bad patterns instead of returning NaN.
Why does len(df.columns) differ from df.shape[1] after a reindex?
BUG: groupby().agg() chained call returns wrong dtype for Int64 columns.
Doc: pandas.DataFrame.merge does not mention the validate parameter, i.e. strict validation modes.
When using pd.merge(left, right, on='id'), NaN values in 'id' produce MergeError.
Question: how do I install pandas extras, e.g. pandas[parquet], via pip?
BUG: DataFrame.reset_index(drop=True) then .set_index('id') does not reset the RangeIndex.
I get UserWarning: Boolean Series key will be reindexed when using df[df['col'] > 0].
ENH: support numpy.float128 dtype in DataFrame.astype() for high-precision data.
